FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DropTargetSpec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

E5-L2 drop TARGET spec (BoxEl.DropTarget — Flutter DragTarget / SwiftUI dropDestination): receives sessions whose Kind is in AcceptKinds. Discovery is hit-test-chain based — per pointer move the engine picks the NEAREST enabled accepting target under the pointer (a non-accepting target never blocks an accepting ancestor). OnEnter/OnLeave fire on hover transitions, OnOver every move while inside, OnDrop on release over it (BEFORE the L1 completion). The DragSession argument is THE one live reused instance — copy what you keep.

public sealed record DropTargetSpec : IEquatable<DropTargetSpec>
Inheritance
object
DropTargetSpec
Implements
IEquatable<DropTargetSpec>

Constructors

DropTargetSpec(string[], Action<DragSession>?, Action<DragSession>?, Action<DragSession>?, Action<DragSession>?)

E5-L2 drop TARGET spec (BoxEl.DropTarget — Flutter DragTarget / SwiftUI dropDestination): receives sessions whose Kind is in AcceptKinds. Discovery is hit-test-chain based — per pointer move the engine picks the NEAREST enabled accepting target under the pointer (a non-accepting target never blocks an accepting ancestor). OnEnter/OnLeave fire on hover transitions, OnOver every move while inside, OnDrop on release over it (BEFORE the L1 completion). The DragSession argument is THE one live reused instance — copy what you keep.

public DropTargetSpec(string[] AcceptKinds, Action<DragSession>? OnEnter = null, Action<DragSession>? OnOver = null, Action<DragSession>? OnLeave = null, Action<DragSession>? OnDrop = null)

AcceptKinds string[]

OnLeave Action<DragSession>
OnDrop Action<DragSession>

Property Value

Action<DragSession>

OnOver 

public Action<DragSession>? OnOver { get; init; }

Property Value

Action<DragSession>

SettleOnDrop

Keep the L1 drop-settle glide after OnDrop (reorder targets — the commit's FLIP retarget turns it into the glide-into-the-new-slot motion). False (default) = the drop suppresses the spring-back and the source visual snaps home: the "deposited" feel of a foreign-surface drop.

public bool SettleOnDrop { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Accepts(string)

Ordinal accept test over AcceptKinds (cast-free, 0-alloc).

public bool Accepts(string kind)

Parameters

kind string

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
